lines.text: I'm on the East Side near Schenk's Corners. The clock reads {{CLOCK}}. We're {{ELAPSED}} in and the neighborhood is — quiet right now. Too quiet. Madison-wide kill count sitting at 139, which puts us about 3% ahead of last year at this hour.

The cold front that came through between 00:30 and 01:00 seems to have driven most activity indoors. I'm seeing lights out in maybe 60% of the residential structures in this three-block radius. That's actually higher than the 2168 pattern — people barricaded early.

Weapons-trade data from my node shows bladed instruments are running at 26% of total kill methods tonight, which — Holden, you're going to appreciate this — that's 4 percentage points above last year same hour. Firearms are dropping as a proportion. Economic pressure, likely.

East Side neighborhood itself has 34 confirmed kills so far. That's right on pace with 2168. The Atwood corridor is the hottest subzone — I'm hearing sirens — no, not sirens, I'm hearing — hold on, my body cam just lost —

Signal's back. Brief dropout. I'm relocating north, away from the commercial strip. Holden, the State Street Ruins — you wanted the comparative data on that zone from 2168 same hour — at 02:00 AM last year they had 24 cumulative kills. Tonight they're at 28. That's 20% hotter, concentrated activity between —

There's a vehicle fire, roughly two blocks northwest of my position. No immediate activity around it. Could be from the 01:20 Beltline incident cascading, could be separate. Building across the street has emergency lighting — flashlights in the windows. Ground floor appears [CUT OFF]

tickerItems.text: Madison-wide cumulative: 139 kills at {{CLOCK}}. +3% YoY same hour. East Side leading at 34 kills.
State Street Ruins running 20% hotter than 2168. Concentrated activity 00:30–02:00 window. Cause unclear.
Widespread power outages reported. PRGE operating on backup. Broadcast integrity at 94%. Tim reports antenna relay stable.
Vehicle fire, East Side near Schenk's. No active threat to populated structures. Fire services not responding (Purge protocol).
